expectations.evidence: **Classification: Medium** ... it affects multiple files in a consistent pattern
Present the plan for human approval before proceeding with any code changes.
The workflow describes phases executed by the agent itself (Phase 3: Implementation, steps 9-11) rather than delegating to a sub-agent. No sub-agent or model delegation is mentioned.
Run the full validation pipeline in order: a. Build, b. Lint Architecture, c. Lint Quality, d. Test, e. Verify E2E
Delegate code review to a different perspective (or model, in an AI context): Present the full diff of all changed files
Commit the changes with a properly formatted commit message: feat: add 'harness validate' CLI command
